steps.label: Introduction
steps.narration: Today we show how Plaid Auth connects bank accounts securely and instantly for your users.

steps.label: Plaid Link — Consent
steps.narration: The user opens Plaid Link and consents to sharing their account data with the application.

steps.label: Plaid Link — OTP
steps.narration: Plaid confirms identity with a one-time passcode sent to the user registered phone number.

steps.label: Plaid Link — Account Selection
steps.narration: The user selects the checking account they want to connect to complete the linking process.

steps.label: Plaid Link — Success
steps.narration: Account linked. Plaid returns the public token for secure server-side exchange immediately.

steps.label: Outcome
steps.narration: The developer now has verified account and routing numbers ready for ACH transactions today.
